title: Stopping a stopped container should not be an error

comments.body: This change needs to be made to `Stop()` as well as `StopWithTimeout()`
Also - can you return `ErrCtrStopped` instead of `nil` and catch/ignore that in `cmd/podman`?

:pushpin: Commit 4a48b99 has been approved by `mheon`
